core_mechanism: sub-linear power-law growth of the number of distinct types as a function of the cumulative number of sampled tokens/events, with a scaling exponent strictly less than one (a Heaps'-law / type-token accumulation law)
brief_reason: The abstract reports that the count of distinct tags grows as a power law with exponent smaller than one in the cumulative number of tagging events, both globally and locally, matching the same sub-linear type-vs-token growth law seen in written text.
